title: Retextured containers GUI
description: Retextures the GUI of most containers to more colorful. Looks better!
body:
![](https://files.catbox.moe/3pzokz.png)

**Features**
- Retextures hopper to an undergraound cave with waterfall.
- Changes Smoker, Blast furnance and furnanae into a desert
- Anvil into a mountain range
- crafter and crafting table into sunset ocean.
- cartography table into under ocean view.
- Brewing stand into a city view
- Shulker box to another city view with canal.
- Grinding stone into swamp.
- Dropper and dispenser intos snowy peaks.

  ――――――――――――――Loved the texture pack? Check out more [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Orenxo)――――――――――――――
